headline: House GOP SLAMS Senate Deal 😤🚫, SHUTDOWN CHAOS 💥🛫 Extends!
text:
House Republicans 🐘🏛️ just YEETED 🚫💥 the Senate's bipartisan DHS deal like a BAD VIBE 😩📉, PROLONGING the partial gov SHUTDOWN 🛑🔒 that's got TSA agents STARVING 😰💸 no pay for OVER A MONTH 📅🚫! Airport HELL 🔥🛫 with MASSIVE lines 🐌😤 cuz 50K TSA bros working UNPAID since Feb 😢🤑, half quitting 👋💨, only 1/3 checkpoints OPEN 😱🚷 – Houston boss Jim Szczesniak SPILLING TEA ☕ 'TOTAL MELTDOWN!' Travelers QUEUING HOURS 😩⏳ like Black Friday but WORSE 🛒💀!

Speaker Mike Johnson 🎤👨‍💼 called Senate bill a STRAIGHT JOKE 😂🤡, House GOP passed THEIR OWN PLAN 📜✅ 213-203 late Friday 🌙🗳️ – funds DHS at CURRENT LEVELS 🤑📊 for 60 DAYS 🗓️ including ICE ❄️🚔 enforcement, NO BORDER OPEN SESAME 🚪🚫! 'We're NOT cucking immigration enforcement!' Johnson ROARS 🦁📢, demanding CASH for BORDER WALL VIBES 🧱🇺🇸. Senate Dems? Chuck Schumer 👴🚫 yells 'DEAD ON ARRIVAL ⚰️💀' – Congress now GHOSTING for TWO-WEEK BREAK 🏖️😎 while TSA starves!

Enter DADDY TRUMP 🍊👑 with EXEC ORDER MAGIC ✨📜: 'Paying TSA AGENTS ASAP 💰🛫, checks by March 30!' DHS X post GOES VIRAL 🔥📱 but CONSTITUTION SIMPS whining 'Congress job!' 😤⚖️. Trump Truth Social FLEX 🐦💪: 'Had to RESCUE TSA from Dem DISASTER!' Senate GOP boss John Thune 😤🗣️ blames Dems: 'No DHS bill cuz they REFUSE deals – Trump SAVES THE DAY 🦸‍♂️🚀!'

Dems PUSHING HARD 🚫❄️ to DEFUND ICE 🚫💸 sans REFORMS: NO MASKS for agents 😷🚫, BAN racial profiling 👮‍♂️🚫, WARRANTS before home raids 🏠🔒! Schumer SPILLS ☕: 'No BLANK CHECK for lawless ICE after Renee Good & Alex Pretti MURDERS 💥🩸 by feds in Minneapolis!' Dems want END to THUG COP VIBES 😡🚔. Republicans? 'BORDERS FIRST 🧱🔒 or BUST!' Shutdown ORGY 💦😩 of finger-pointing, airports CRASHING 📉🛫, Trump swooping in like AVENGERS ENDGAME 🦸‍♂️💥 – WHO BLINKS FIRST in this CONGRESS COCKFIGHT 🐔⚔️? TSA simps PRAYING 🙏💰 while pols VACAY 🏖️🍹! ‼️🛑
